ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the location */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographical features of the location */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the phase */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the phase */,
  "phase_lead" INTEGER /* User ID of the phase lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cheeses" (
  "cheese_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of cheese */,
  "cheese_name" TEXT /* Name of the cheese */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cheese */,
  "smell" TEXT /* Smell type of the cheese */,
  "taste" TEXT /* Taste type of the cheese */,
  "texture" TEXT /* Texture type of the cheese */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cheese_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charms" (
  "charm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charm */,
  "charm_name" TEXT /* Name of the charm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the charm */,
  "charm_type" TEXT /* Type of charm */,
  "charm_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the charm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "animal_name" TEXT /* Name of the animal */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the animal */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Natural habitat of the animal */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet type of the animal */,
  "behavior" TEXT /* Behavior type of the animal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attractions" (
  "attraction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attraction record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phase during which data was collected */,
  "cheese_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cheese that was used */,
  "charm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charm that was used */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal being attracted */,
  "attraction_rate" REAL /* Attraction rate percentage */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Size of the sample group for this observation */,
  "animal_count" INTEGER /* Number of animals attracted */,
  "cheese_consumption" REAL /* Amount of cheese consumed during the attraction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attraction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attractions_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attractions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attractions_charm_id FOREIGN KEY ("charm_id") REFERENCES charms ("charm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attractions_cheese_id FOREIGN KEY ("cheese_id") REFERENCES cheeses ("cheese_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attractions_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, analyst) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cheese_charms" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cheese-charm pair */,
  "cheese_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cheese used */,
  "charm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charm used */,
  "combination_id" INTEGER /* Unique ID for each cheese-charm combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cheese_charms_cheese_id FOREIGN KEY ("cheese_id") REFERENCES cheeses ("cheese_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cheese_charms_charm_id FOREIGN KEY ("charm_id") REFERENCES charms ("charm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attraction_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "data_filters" TEXT /* Filters applied to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attraction_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample metric */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sample was taken */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Size of the sample taken */,
  "sample_method" TEXT /* Method used for sample collection */,
  "sample_error" REAL /* Error margin for the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
